positive: A seamless, highly detailed pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent tropical flora and celestial constellations. The composition must be symmetrical and centralized, utilizing repeating patterns suitable for apparel printing. Elements include curling stylized leaves, interconnected floral mandalas, and subtle geometric star charts, rendered in a deep indigo and glowing teal color palette against an off-black background. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and deep space cosmic vaporwave, emphasizing clean silhouettes, strong lines, and high contrast for maximum visual pop. Photorealistic digital painting, intricate linework, vector art quality.
